action.proof_term:
intro n hn h1 h2
  have hchar : ∀ r : ℕ, 2 ≤ r → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r ≤ 3 → r.Prime ∨ ∃ p, p.Prime ∧ r = p ^ 2 := by
    intro r hr2 hrsig
    set p := r.minFac with hp_def
    have hp_prime : p.Prime := Nat.minFac_prime (by omega)
    have hp_dvd0 : p ∣ r := Nat.minFac_dvd r
    obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := hp_dvd0
    have hp_dvd : p ∣ r := ⟨c, hc⟩
    have hc_dvd : c ∣ r := ⟨p, by rw [hc]; ring⟩
    by_cases hc1 : c = 1
    · left
      rw [hc1, mul_one] at hc
      rw [hc]
      exact hp_prime
    · by_cases hcp : c = p
      · right
        exact ⟨p, hp_prime, by rw [hc, hcp]; ring⟩
      · exfalso
        have hp2 : 2 ≤ p := hp_prime.two_le
        have hc2 : 2 ≤ c := by
          rcases Nat.lt_or_ge c 2 with h | h
          · interval_cases c
            · omega
            · exact absurd rfl hc1
          · exact h
        have h1p : (1:ℕ) ≠ p := by omega
        have h1c : (1:ℕ) ≠ c := by omega
        have h1r : (1:ℕ) ≠ r := by omega
        have hpc : p ≠ c := fun he => hcp he.symm
        have hpr : p ≠ r := by
          intro he
          rw [← he] at hc
          have : c = 1 := by nlinarith [hc]
          exact hc1 this
        have hcr : c ≠ r := by
          intro he
          rw [← he] at hc
          have : p = 1 := by nlinarith [hc]
          omega
        have hdvd4 : ({1, p, c, r} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ r.divisors := by
          intro x hx
          simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx
          rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
          rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
          · exact ⟨one_dvd _, by omega⟩
          · exact ⟨hp_dvd, by omega⟩
          · exact ⟨hc_dvd, by omega⟩
          · exact ⟨dvd_refl _, by omega⟩
        have hcard4 : ({1, p, c, r} : Finset ℕ).card = 4 := by
          rw [Finset.card_insert_of_notMem (by simp [h1p, h1c, h1r]),
              Finset.card_insert_of_notMem (by simp [hpc, hpr]),
              Finset.card_insert_of_notMem (by simp [hcr]),
              Finset.card_singleton]
        have hle : 4 ≤ r.divisors.card := by
          rw [← hcard4]
          exact Finset.card_le_card hdvd4
        rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hrsig
        omega
  have hn1ge : 24 ≤ n - 1 := by omega
  have hn1char := hchar (n - 1) (by omega) h1
  have hn1odd : Odd (n - 1) := by
    rcases hn1char with hprime | ⟨p, hp, hpeq⟩
    · rcases hprime.eq_two_or_odd' with h2' | hodd
      · omega
      · exact hodd
    · have hp5 : 5 ≤ p := by
        by_contra hlt
        push_neg at hlt
        interval_cases p <;> simp_all <;> omega
      have hpodd : Odd p := by
        rcases hp.eq_two_or_odd' with h2' | hodd
        · omega
        · exact hodd
      rw [hpeq]
      exact hpodd.pow
  have hneven : Even n := by
    rcases hn1odd with ⟨j, hj⟩
    exact ⟨j + 1, by omega⟩
  obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := hneven
  have hn2eq : n - 2 = 2 * (m - 1) := by omega
  have hmge : 13 ≤ m := by omega
  have hn2ge24 : 24 ≤ n - 2 := by omega
  obtain ⟨a, s, hsodd, hs_eq⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_pow_mul_and_not_dvd (show m - 1 ≠ 0 by omega) 2 (by norm_num)
  have hn2full : n - 2 = 2 ^ (a + 1) * s := by
    rw [hn2eq, hs_eq]; ring
  have hs_pos : 0 < s := by
    rcases Nat.eq_zero_or_pos s with h0 | h0
    · exfalso; rw [h0, mul_zero] at hn2full; omega
    · exact h0
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (a + 1)) s := (Nat.prime_two.coprime_iff_not_dvd.mpr hsodd).pow_left (a + 1)
  have hsig2pow : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (2 ^ (a + 1)) = a + 2 := by
    rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply, Nat.divisors_prime_pow Nat.prime_two, Finset.card_map, Finset.card_range]
  have hsigeq : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 2) = (a + 2) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s := by
    rw [hn2full, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop, hsig2pow]
  have hsig_s_pos : 1 ≤ ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s := by
    rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
    have h1mem : (1:ℕ) ∈ s.divisors := Nat.one_mem_divisors.mpr (by omega)
    exact Finset.card_pos.mpr ⟨1, h1mem⟩
  have ha_le : a ≤ 2 := by
    rw [hsigeq] at h2
    have hmul : (a + 2) * 1 ≤ (a + 2) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s := Nat.mul_le_mul_left (a + 2) hsig_s_pos
    omega
  have ha0 : a = 0 := by
    interval_cases a
    · rfl
    · exfalso
      rw [hsigeq] at h2
      have hsig_s1 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 1 := by omega
      have hcard1 : s.divisors.card ≤ 1 := by rw [← ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]; exact hsig_s1
      have h1mem : (1:ℕ) ∈ s.divisors := Nat.one_mem_divisors.mpr (by omega)
      have hsmem : s ∈ s.divisors := Nat.mem_divisors.mpr ⟨dvd_refl s, by omega⟩
      have hs1 : s = 1 := (Finset.card_le_one.mp hcard1) s hsmem 1 h1mem
      rw [hs1] at hn2full
      norm_num at hn2full
      omega
    · exfalso
      rw [hsigeq] at h2
      have hsig_s1 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 1 := by omega
      have hcard1 : s.divisors.card ≤ 1 := by rw [← ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]; exact hsig_s1
      have h1mem : (1:ℕ) ∈ s.divisors := Nat.one_mem_divisors.mpr (by omega)
      have hsmem : s ∈ s.divisors := Nat.mem_divisors.mpr ⟨dvd_refl s, by omega⟩
      have hs1 : s = 1 := (Finset.card_le_one.mp hcard1) s hsmem 1 h1mem
      rw [hs1] at hn2full
      norm_num at hn2full
      omega
  have hn2is2s : n - 2 = 2 * s := by
    rw [hn2full, ha0]; ring
  have hsge12 : 12 ≤ s := by omega
  have hsig_s2 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 2 := by
    rw [hsigeq, ha0] at h2
    omega
  have hsne1 : s ≠ 1 := by omega
  have hset : ({1, s} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ s.divisors := by
    intro x hx
    simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx
    rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
    rcases hx with rfl | rfl
    · exact ⟨one_dvd _, by omega⟩
    · exact ⟨dvd_refl _, by omega⟩
  have hcard2 : ({1, s} : Finset ℕ).card = 2 := by
    rw [Finset.card_insert_of_notMem (by simp; omega), Finset.card_singleton]
  have hdeq : s.divisors = ({1, s} : Finset ℕ) := by
    have hcardle : s.divisors.card ≤ ({1, s} : Finset ℕ).card := by
      rw [hcard2, ← ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
      exact hsig_s2
    exact (Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le hset hcardle).symm
  have hsprime : s.Prime := by
    rw [Nat.prime_def_lt]
    refine ⟨by omega, ?_⟩
    intro x hxlt hxdvd
    have hxmem : x ∈ s.divisors := Nat.mem_divisors.mpr ⟨hxdvd, by omega⟩
    rw [hdeq] at hxmem
    simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hxmem
    rcases hxmem with rfl | rfl
    · rfl
    · omega
  refine ⟨s, hsprime, by omega, ?_⟩
  rcases hn1char with hprime | ⟨p, hp, hpeq⟩
  · exact hprime
  · exfalso
    have hp5 : 5 ≤ p := by
      by_contra hlt
      push_neg at hlt
      interval_cases p <;> simp_all <;> omega
    have hpodd : Odd p := by
      rcases hp.eq_two_or_odd' with h2' | hodd
      · omega
      · exact hodd
    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := hpodd
    have heq1 : p ^ 2 = 2 * s + 1 := by
      have e1 : n - 1 = p ^ 2 := hpeq
      omega
    have hpsq : p ^ 2 = 4 * (k * (k + 1)) + 1 := by rw [hk]; ring
    have heven : Even (k * (k + 1)) := Nat.even_mul_succ_self k
    obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := heven
    rw [hpsq, hj] at heq1
    have hs4 : s = 4 * j := by omega
    have h2dvd : (2:ℕ) ∣ s := ⟨2 * j, by omega⟩
    have hseq2 := (Nat.prime_dvd_prime_iff_eq Nat.prime_two hsprime).mp h2dvd
    omega

intro n hn h1 h2
  have hchar : ∀ r : ℕ, 2 ≤ r → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r ≤ 3 → r.Prime ∨ ∃ p, p.Prime ∧ r = p ^ 2 := by
    intro r hr2 hrsig
    set p := r.minFac with hp_def
    have hp_prime : p.Prime := Nat.minFac_prime (by omega)
    have hp_dvd0 : p ∣ r := Nat.minFac_dvd r
    obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := hp_dvd0
    have hp_dvd : p ∣ r := ⟨c, hc⟩
    have hc_dvd : c ∣ r := ⟨p, by rw [hc]; ring⟩
    by_cases hc1 : c = 1
    · left
      rw [hc1, mul_one] at hc
      rw [hc]
      exact hp_prime
    · by_cases hcp : c = p
      · right
        exact ⟨p, hp_prime, by rw [hc, hcp]; ring⟩
      · exfalso
        have hp2 : 2 ≤ p := hp_prime.two_le
        have hc2 : 2 ≤ c := by
          rcases Nat.lt_or_ge c 2 with h | h
          · interval_cases c
            · omega
            · exact absurd rfl hc1
          · exact h
        have h1p : (1:ℕ) ≠ p := by omega
        have h1c : (1:ℕ) ≠ c := by omega
        have h1r : (1:ℕ) ≠ r := by omega
        have hpc : p ≠ c := fun he => hcp he.symm
        have hpr : p ≠ r := by
          intro he
          rw [← he] at hc
          have : c = 1 := by nlinarith [hc]
          exact hc1 this
        have hcr : c ≠ r := by
          intro he
          rw [← he] at hc
          have : p = 1 := by nlinarith [hc]
          omega
        have hdvd4 : ({1, p, c, r} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ r.divisors := by
          intro x hx
          simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx
          rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
          rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
          · exact ⟨one_dvd _, by omega⟩
          · exact ⟨hp_dvd, by omega⟩
          · exact ⟨hc_dvd, by omega⟩
          · exact ⟨dvd_refl _, by omega⟩
        have hcard4 : ({1, p, c, r} : Finset ℕ).card = 4 := by
          rw [Finset.card_insert_of_notMem (by simp [h1p, h1c, h1r]),
              Finset.card_insert_of_notMem (by simp [hpc, hpr]),
              Finset.card_insert_of_notMem (by simp [hcr]),
              Finset.card_singleton]
        have hle : 4 ≤ r.divisors.card := by
          rw [← hcard4]
          exact Finset.card_le_card hdvd4
        rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hrsig
        omega
  have hn1ge : 24 ≤ n - 1 := by omega
  have hn1char := hchar (n - 1) (by omega) h1
  have hn1odd : Odd (n - 1) := by
    rcases hn1char with hprime | ⟨p, hp, hpeq⟩
    · rcases hprime.eq_two_or_odd' with h2' | hodd
      · omega
      · exact hodd
    · have hp5 : 5 ≤ p := by
        by_contra hlt
        push_neg at hlt
        interval_cases p <;> simp_all <;> omega
      have hpodd : Odd p := by
        rcases hp.eq_two_or_odd' with h2' | hodd
        · omega
        · exact hodd
      rw [hpeq]
      exact hpodd.pow
  have hneven : Even n := by
    rcases hn1odd with ⟨j, hj⟩
    exact ⟨j + 1, by omega⟩
  obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := hneven
  have hn2eq : n - 2 = 2 * (m - 1) := by omega
  have hmge : 13 ≤ m := by omega
  have hn2ge24 : 24 ≤ n - 2 := by omega
  obtain ⟨a, s, hsodd, hs_eq⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_pow_mul_and_not_dvd (show m - 1 ≠ 0 by omega) 2 (by norm_num)
  have hn2full : n - 2 = 2 ^ (a + 1) * s := by
    rw [hn2eq, hs_eq]; ring
  have hs_pos : 0 < s := by
    rcases Nat.eq_zero_or_pos s with h0 | h0
    · exfalso; rw [h0, mul_zero] at hn2full; omega
    · exact h0
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (a + 1)) s := (Nat.prime_two.coprime_iff_not_dvd.mpr hsodd).pow_left (a + 1)
  have hsig2pow : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (2 ^ (a + 1)) = a + 2 := by
    rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply, Nat.divisors_prime_pow Nat.prime_two, Finset.card_map, Finset.card_range]
  have hsigeq : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 2) = (a + 2) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s := by
    rw [hn2full, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop, hsig2pow]
  have hsig_s_pos : 1 ≤ ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s := by
    rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
    have h1mem : (1:ℕ) ∈ s.divisors := Nat.one_mem_divisors.mpr (by omega)
    exact Finset.card_pos.mpr ⟨1, h1mem⟩
  have ha_le : a ≤ 2 := by
    rw [hsigeq] at h2
    have hmul : (a + 2) * 1 ≤ (a + 2) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s := Nat.mul_le_mul_left (a + 2) hsig_s_pos
    omega
  have ha0 : a = 0 := by
    interval_cases a
    · rfl
    · exfalso
      rw [hsigeq] at h2
      have hsig_s1 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 1 := by omega
      have hcard1 : s.divisors.card ≤ 1 := by rw [← ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]; exact hsig_s1
      have h1mem : (1:ℕ) ∈ s.divisors := Nat.one_mem_divisors.mpr (by omega)
      have hsmem : s ∈ s.divisors := Nat.mem_divisors.mpr ⟨dvd_refl s, by omega⟩
      have hs1 : s = 1 := (Finset.card_le_one.mp hcard1) s hsmem 1 h1mem
      rw [hs1] at hn2full
      norm_num at hn2full
      omega
    · exfalso
      rw [hsigeq] at h2
      have hsig_s1 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 1 := by omega
      have hcard1 : s.divisors.card ≤ 1 := by rw [← ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]; exact hsig_s1
      have h1mem : (1:ℕ) ∈ s.divisors := Nat.one_mem_divisors.mpr (by omega)
      have hsmem : s ∈ s.divisors := Nat.mem_divisors.mpr ⟨dvd_refl s, by omega⟩
      have hs1 : s = 1 := (Finset.card_le_one.mp hcard1) s hsmem 1 h1mem
      rw [hs1] at hn2full
      norm_num at hn2full
      omega
  have hn2is2s : n - 2 = 2 * s := by
    rw [hn2full, ha0]; ring
  have hsge12 : 12 ≤ s := by omega
  have hsig_s2 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 2 := by
    rw [hsigeq, ha0] at h2
    omega
  have hsne1 : s ≠ 1 := by omega
  have hset : ({1, s} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ s.divisors := by
    intro x hx
    simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx
    rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
    rcases hx with rfl | rfl
    · exact ⟨one_dvd _, by omega⟩
    · exact ⟨dvd_refl _, by omega⟩
  have hcard2 : ({1, s} : Finset ℕ).card = 2 := by
    rw [Finset.card_insert_of_notMem (by simp; omega), Finset.card_singleton]
  have hdeq : s.divisors = ({1, s} : Finset ℕ) := by
    have hcardle : s.divisors.card ≤ ({1, s} : Finset ℕ).card := by
      rw [hcard2, ← ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
      exact hsig_s2
    exact (Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le hset hcardle).symm
  have hsprime : s.Prime := by
    rw [Nat.prime_def_lt]
    refine ⟨by omega, ?_⟩
    intro x hxlt hxdvd
    have hxmem : x ∈ s.divisors := Nat.mem_divisors.mpr ⟨hxdvd, by omega⟩
    rw [hdeq] at hxmem
    simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hxmem
    rcases hxmem with rfl | rfl
    · rfl
    · omega
  refine ⟨s, hsprime, by omega, ?_⟩
  rcases hn1char with hprime | ⟨p, hp, hpeq⟩
  · exact hprime
  · exfalso
    have hp5 : 5 ≤ p := by
      by_contra hlt
      push_neg at hlt
      interval_cases p <;> simp_all <;> omega
    have hpodd : Odd p := by
      rcases hp.eq_two_or_odd' with h2' | hodd
      · omega
      · exact hodd
    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := hpodd
    have heq1 : p ^ 2 = 2 * s + 1 := by
      have e1 : n - 1 = p ^ 2 := hpeq
      omega
    have hpsq : p ^ 2 = 4 * (k * (k + 1)) + 1 := by rw [hk]; ring
    have heven : Even (k * (k + 1)) := Nat.even_mul_succ_self k
    obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := heven
    rw [hpsq, hj] at heq1
    have hs4 : s = 4 * j := by omega
    have h2dvd : (2:ℕ) ∣ s := ⟨2 * j, by omega⟩
    have hseq2 := (Nat.prime_dvd_prime_iff_eq Nat.prime_two hsprime).mp h2dvd
    omega

info.lean_statement: ∀ n : ℕ, 24 < n → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 1) ≤ 3 → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 2) ≤ 4 → ∃ q : ℕ, Nat.Prime q ∧ n = 2 * q + 2 ∧ Nat.Prime (n - 1)

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
